name: White Chili#2
recipeIngredient: 2 cans pinto beans, one drained and rinsed, the other not drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, sauté olive oil and butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion, green pepper, garlic, carrot, and celery; cook 6-8 minutes until softened.
3. Gently add the cooked chicken, broth, and beans to the pan.
4. Stir in vermouth, chickpeas (if using), cumin, Tabasco sauce, chili powder, honey, and hot sauce.
5. Simmer on low heat for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Top each serving with shredded mozzarella cheese, if desired.
